description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, surrounded by manicured hedges and landscaping. The exterior walls are finished in a muted pinkish-brown color, with large, evenly spaced windows on both floors. The front features a small entryway with a short set of steps, a fountain, and a paved path leading to the main door. The backyard includes a patio area, a small pool or hot tub, and additional greenery, with a detached circular pool or water feature nearby. The roof appears accessible and partially open, suggesting possible rooftop amenities or terraces. The overall design is modern with clean lines and a focus on symmetry and outdoor integration.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, large windows, manicured hedges, and landscaped outdoor areas including a patio and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, fountain, hedges, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended hedges, side garden, and detached circular pool feature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, large windows, and the main pool or hot tub area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible garage area, side garden, and the detached pool feature.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with short steps, paved path, small porch, and decorative fountain flanked by hedges.
